case_title: JOHNSON, RACHEL VS CIRELLI, ROSETTA A.

docket_entries.description: CERT MAIL SENT TO ROSETTA A. CIRELLI RETURNED SIGNED
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CIRELLI, ROSETTA A.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,200.00 FILED BY JOHNSON, RACHEL AS TO DEFENDANT CIRELLI, ROSETTA A. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-12-2005 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
DEFT CONTINUANCE REQUEST FILED LESS THAN 10 DAYS BEFORE THE COURT DATE. DEFT'S SISTER SIGNED THE FORM DUE TO AN EMERGENCY. $10 FEE PAID.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT CIRELLI, ROSETTA A.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JOHNSON, RACHEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CIRELLI, ROSETTA A. $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $62.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,062.00, DEFT FILED A LATE REQUEST FOR A CONTINUANCE. PLTF OBJECTS TO DEFT'S REQUEST DUE IN PART TO THE FACT THAT HER WITNESS TOOK TIME OFF FROM WORK ON 10/12/05 TO ATTEND HEARING. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
